input.query:
=-- # 1. Map the 'Scope' to specific SOQL snippets
scope_query = case _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","scope"]}')
  when 'my_opportunities' then "OwnerId = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"salesforce","line":"7f99cd10","path":["records",{"path_element_type":"current_item"},"Id"]}')'"
  when 'my_open_opportunities' then "OwnerId = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"salesforce","line":"7f99cd10","path":["records",{"path_element_type":"current_item"},"Id"]}')' AND IsClosed = false"
  when 'my_opportunity_team' then "Id IN (SELECT OpportunityId FROM OpportunityTeamMember WHERE UserId = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"salesforce","line":"7f99cd10","path":["records",{"path_element_type":"current_item"},"Id"]}')')"
  else nil
end

-- # 2. Collect all active filters
filters = [
  scope_query,
  ("Name LIKE '%_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_name"]}')%'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_name"]}').present?),
  ("Id = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_id"]}')'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_id"]}').present?),
  ("Opportunity_Number__c = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_number"]}')'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","opportunity_number"]}').present?),
  ("AccountId IN (_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","account_ids"]}'))" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","account_ids"]}').present?),
  ("StageName = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","stage_name"]}')'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","stage_name"]}').present?),
  ("IsRenewal__c = _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_renewal"]}') if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_renewal"]}').present?),
  ("Primary_Product__c = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","primary_product"]}')'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","primary_product"]}').present?),
  ("IsClosed = _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_closed"]}') if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_closed"]}').present?),
  ("CloseDate >= _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_from"]}')" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_from"]}').present?),
  ("CloseDate <= _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_to"]}')" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_to"]}').present?)
]

-- # 3. Join them together
filters.compact.join(' AND ')

  ("Primary_Product__c = '_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","primary_product"]}')'" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","primary_product"]}').present?),
  ("IsClosed = _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_closed"]}') if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","is_closed"]}').present?),
  ("CloseDate >= _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_from"]}')" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_from"]}').present?),
  ("CloseDate <= _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_to"]}')" if _dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"707e915e","path":["context","headers","close_date_to"]}').present?)
]

-- # 3. Join them together
filters.compact.join(' AND ')

SELECT COUNT() FROM Opportunity where filters
